findings.title: Required bun test gate is not green and CI runs a narrower substitute
findings.description: The ticket explicitly requires CI to run bun test plus tsc --noEmit, and the verification requires bun test to be green. In this worktree, bun test exits nonzero because it discovers artifacts/smithering/poc/safety-hook-approval-roundtrip/poc.test.ts and fails to start its fixed-port local servers. The workflow instead runs bun test ./src ./test, so the actual required gate is neither wired into CI nor passing.
